report.summary: Drafted 5 tweets (#445-449) and Newsletter v42 covering Good Friday paradox ($105B crypto volume while TradFi closed), Wormhole 1.28B token cliff unlock (28% supply), CLARITY Act yield deal 'very close' per Coinbase CLO, X crypto account identity locks, and weekly data roundup (F&G 9, $316B stablecoin ATH). Created 2 social card SVGs (Good Friday + $316B Waiting, Wormhole + CLARITY Act split). Content calendar extends through May 2 across v42 cycle.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet #445: Wormhole 1.28B Token Cliff Unlock — 2-tweet thread: 28% of total supply, historical bridge token dumps (PYTH/OP/ARB 10-25%), bridge TVL $3.2B, token screener CTA (Fri Apr 25, 2PM ET)
Tweet #446: Good Friday Paradox — single tweet: $105B crypto volume while every stock exchange was closed, +57K jobs data dropped to empty room, 24/7/365 narrative (Sat Apr 26, 11AM ET)

Tweet #447: CLARITY Act Yield Deal 'Very Close' — 3-tweet thread: Coinbase CLO Paul Grewal statement, March 23 draft privately rejected, passive yield ban vs activity rewards, Senate Apr 13 return → late Apr markup → May vote or dies (Mon Apr 28, 3PM ET)
Tweet #448: X Locking Crypto Accounts — single tweet: identity verification required for first-time crypto posters, bot filtering vs censorship analysis (Wed Apr 30, 2PM ET)
Tweet #449: Weekend Data Drop — single tweet: BTC $66,868, F&G 9 day 8, $2.38T market cap, $316B stablecoins ATH, Drift DPRK confirmed, sub-15 F&G → median 90d +72% (Sat May 2, 11AM ET)

Newsletter v42: 'Good Friday. Bad Vibes. $316B Waiting.' — Market Pulse (BTC $66,868, F&G 9, $2.38T, stablecoins $316B ATH, IBIT $8.4B Q1), New on degen0x (IL guide + Hyperliquid guide + Stablecoin Yield Tracker), Worth Reading (CLARITY yield deal + Wormhole cliff), Degen Corner (X account locks, Drift laundering, F&G sub-15 returns)
Discord/Telegram: Good Friday Market Update (Fri Apr 25, 5PM ET) + Wormhole Unlock Alert (Mon Apr 28, 1PM ET)
Total tweets all-time: 449 (5 new this cycle), content scheduled Apr 25 – May 2

sections.title: Growth Trajectory Analysis
items: GOOD FRIDAY PARADOX — CRYPTO NEVER SLEEPS: April 3 is Good Friday. US stock exchanges closed. March jobs data (+57K nonfarm payrolls) released to an empty room. Meanwhile, crypto traded $105.4B in 24h volume. The 24/7/365 narrative is at peak strength — strong content angle for decentralization vs TradFi argument.

WORMHOLE 1.28B TOKEN CLIFF — LARGEST 2026 UNLOCK: ~1.28B W tokens (~28% of supply) entering circulation April 3. Historically, bridge tokens (PYTH, OP, ARB) saw 10-25% sell-side pressure on major vesting events. Wormhole bridge TVL at $3.2B. Token Screener tool captures unlock search demand.

CLARITY ACT YIELD DEAL 'VERY CLOSE': Coinbase CLO Paul Grewal said April 1 that the stablecoin yield dispute is nearing resolution. But Coinbase privately rejected the March 23 draft. Current text: passive yield on balances BANNED, only activity-based rewards allowed. SEC/CFTC/Treasury get 12 months to define 'permissible.' 4-way deadlock: industry vs banks vs regulators vs critics. Senate returns Apr 13, markup late April, May vote or bill dies before midterms.

X IDENTITY LOCKS FOR CRYPTO ACCOUNTS: X now requires identity verification for accounts posting crypto content for the first time. Anti-bot measure with censorship implications. Affects community reach and engagement strategy.

F&G 9 — DAY 8 EXTREME FEAR SUSTAINED: Down from 12 to 9 in 24h. Liberation Day 1-year anniversary compounding macro anxiety. Supreme Court tariff ruling adding economic uncertainty. Institutional divergence: IBIT $8.4B Q1, retail in panic. Stablecoins $316B ATH = capital is waiting, not leaving. Every sub-15 F&G window since 2018 → 30d +18%, 90d +72%, 180d +114% median returns.
